love.title: Love · Ài
love.description: Love is the inner driving force of every exchange — a creative desire and sense of connection arising from the essence of life. The highest and most sustainable self-interest is inevitably achieved through the path of benefiting others. Your actions create value for others' well-being; what you ultimately achieve is the maximization of your own life's purpose.

stats.label: Mission
stats.value: Love is the spring, benefit is the river, exchange is the flow. Let love surge through altruism, and every exchange resonates with well-being.

yi.title: Yi · Exchange
yi.motto: Supreme good is like water — it benefits all things without contention
yi.description: Understanding the I Ching begins with grasping its essence — "Yi" means "exchange." This is not merely monetary trade, but the value exchange among all life's stakeholders for shared well-being.

stats.label: Simple (简易)
stats.value: Exchange is as natural as air and water. A smile, a yielding step — each is the most microscopic expression of the law of exchange.

stats.label: Changing (变易)
stats.value: The world is dynamic. Trading strategies evolve constantly. Yielding small benefits can create great mutual gain.

stats.label: Unchanging (不易)
stats.value: Beneath all change, one eternal law governs: win-win mutual benefit. Any exchange violating this cannot endure.

qian.title: Qián · The Creative
qian.motto: Heaven moves vigorously; the superior person strengthens himself ceaselessly
qian.yongci: Use of Nines: A host of dragons without a leader — auspicious.
qian.description: Qián is the active party, the initiator of exchange. Playing the role of Qián means being the executor of "benefiting others" — transforming inner conviction, passion, and talent (love) into excellent products and services (benefit) through tireless effort.

stages.title: Seed
stages.desc: The enterprise hides its strength, refining core value like a submerged dragon.

stages.title: Awakening
stages.desc: Value emerges; connecting with key stakeholders and securing support.

stages.title: Growth
stages.desc: Rapid growth with diligence and vigilance through opportunities and risks.

stages.title: Leap
stages.desc: At the crossroads of strategy — precise judgment, flexible response.

stages.title: Peak
stages.desc: Reputation reaches its zenith; taking on greater social responsibility.

stages.title: Maturity
stages.desc: Guard against decline; proactively seek self-transformation and innovation.

kun.title: Kūn · The Receptive
kun.motto: The earth's condition is receptive devotion; the superior person supports all things with profound virtue
kun.guaci: Kūn: Sublime, Success, Benefiting through the mare's perseverance.
kun.yongci: Use of Sixes: Benefit in eternal perseverance.
kun.description: Kūn holds the power of choice — the acceptor and the enabler of exchange. Every purchase, every acceptance, every following is a sacred vote cast with profound virtue. It is Kūn's choice that determines which creation of Qián will be nourished and sustained.

stages.title: Entering
stages.desc: Stepping into the market, alert and serious about every choice.

stages.title: First Screening
stages.desc: Drawn to options that are frank, well-specified, and of grand value.

stages.title: Deep Evaluation
stages.desc: Activating inner standards, deep comparison, trusting authority and leaders.

stages.title: Narrowing Down
stages.desc: Closing off new information, making a grounded personal decision.

stages.title: Deal Complete
stages.desc: The choice fits perfectly — bringing heartfelt satisfaction and loyalty.

stages.title: Broken Trust
stages.desc: When promises are betrayed, consumers redirect their hurt back to the seller.

111.description: Core foundation driving the vision of universal kindness and All Lives Matter.

110.description: National-level partnerships and governance allocation for ecological impact.

101.description: Community engagement, marketing, and lottery-based fair distribution.

100.description: Creators and builders constructing tools and infrastructure for DUKI in Action.

011.description: Open-source contributors, translators, and volunteers supporting the ecosystem.

010.description: Mission-aligned investors providing capital for sustainable growth.

001.description: Long-term maintainers ensuring the protocol's reliability and evolution.

000.description: Content creators, artists, and storytellers spreading the message of kindness.

flow.step1Title: Makers Marketing by sharing profits globally
flow.step1Body: Sellers and makers price their products to share profits beyond shareholders — with the world. This is the DUKI deal: open, borderless, aligned.
flow.step2Title: A deal the taker fulfills, minting DUKI + ALM
flow.step2Body: When a taker buys from a maker, stablecoin flows into the treasury. Two tokens are minted:
flow.dukiDesc: Stays locked in the treasury — backs real human income
flow.almDesc: 50% to maker · 50% to taker — governance & rewards
flow.step3Title: DUKI flows to all as a reminder of 'Kindness First'
flow.step3Body: DUKI is distributed proportionally to verified humans on Ethereum, backed by World ID. No bots. No whales. People only.
flow.step4Title: Do whatever you want — the world's future depends on all
flow.step4Body: Spend or redeem DUKI. Use it directly as currency, or redeem for stablecoins from the treasury. Redemption must happen on the originating chain.
flow.title: DUKI In Action
